title: Lead Instructional Designer at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Instructional Designer in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
